title: Filter by a range of days
excerpt: We would like to be able to filter by a range of days from today (ex. 31-60 days out) so we know what communications/attention jobs need. Filtering by “in the next 60 days” and “is after this month” does not give us the …

posts.author: Ashleigh (ashleigh lacy)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to be able to filter by a range of days from today (ex. 31-60 days out) so we know what communications/attention jobs need. Filtering by “in the next 60 days” and “is after this month” does not give us the range we are looking for.
